description_long: This sculpture depicts the head of a young person with stylized, textured hair and a serene facial expression. The head is rendered in a brownish material, possibly terracotta or bronze, and is mounted on a solid, rectangular stone pedestal. The facial features are softly modeled, with closed lips and slightly downcast eyes, giving the figure a contemplative look. The hair is sculpted with pronounced, wavy locks that add dynamic texture to the piece. The back of the head is less detailed, focusing on the overall form rather than individual features. The pedestal is a simple, gray stone block that provides a stable and contrasting base for the more detailed head above.
description: A stylized brown head of a young person with textured hair, mounted on a gray stone pedestal. The sculpture features soft facial details and a contemplative expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the serene face, detailed hair, and the full frontal aspect of the stone pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, ear, and the wavy texture of the hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with less detail and the full width of the stone pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, ear, and the sculpted hair texture.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
